title: lycopus europaeus var. glabrescens
intro: Lycopus europaeus var. glabrescens, also known as European bugle, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of European bugle include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. European bugle can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for various forms of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
